title: LoggingCommon
description: Common properties shared across all logging endpoint types.

name.description: The name for the real-time logging configuration.

placement.description: Where in the generated VCL the logging call should be placed.

format_version.description: The version of the custom logging format used for the configured endpoint.

response_condition.description: The name of an existing condition in the configured endpoint, or leave blank to always execute.

format.description: A Fastly log format string. Supports Apache Common Log variables.
